task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Vital Signs' clinical application is launched.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A window for the OpenICE 'Vital Signs' clinical application is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the simulated 'Infusion Pump' device adapter is launched.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A window for the simulated 'Infusion Pump' device adapter is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the simulated 'Multiparameter Monitor' device adapter is launched.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A window for the simulated 'Multiparameter Monitor' device adapter is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Vital Signs' application occupies the top half of the screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Vital Signs' window is positioned at the top of the screen and spans approximately the full width (1920 pixels) and half the height (540 pixels).

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Infusion Pump' window occupies the bottom-left quadrant.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Infusion Pump' window is positioned in the bottom-left corner, spanning approximately half the width (960 pixels) and half the height (540 pixels).

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Multiparameter Monitor' window occupies the bottom-right quadrant.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Multiparameter Monitor' window is positioned in the bottom-right corner, spanning approximately half the width (960 pixels) and half the height (540 pixels).

task_completion.description: Verify that the three windows form a non-overlapping T-Layout.
task_completion.visual_evidence: None of the three specified windows overlap each other; their borders meet cleanly to form a 'T' shape on the desktop.

task_completion.description: Verify that a screenshot of the final layout was saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal command executing a screenshot save to '/home/ga/Desktop/dashboard_layout.png', a screenshot tool saving to this path, or an icon appearing on the desktop named 'dashboard_layout.png'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual OpenICE graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The windows shown are genuine OpenICE application windows with standard OS window decorations, not mockups, text-based representations, or an image viewer displaying a pre-made picture.

integrity.description: Ensure the layout was achieved by moving and resizing actual application windows.
integrity.visual_evidence: The desktop environment shows distinct active windows being manipulated, rather than a single full-screen image or a script outputting text.

integrity.description: Ensure a real screenshot was taken and saved.
integrity.visual_evidence: Usage of a legitimate screenshot utility (like gnome-screenshot, scrot, or a GUI tool) rather than just creating an empty file named .png via terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The screen resolution is exactly 1920x1080. The top half should be approximately 1920x540. The bottom-left and bottom-right quadrants should be approximately 960x540 each. OpenICE is a real medical device interoperability platform; expect to see its characteristic Java-based UI for the Vital Signs app, Infusion Pump, and Multiparameter Monitor. The final screenshot must be saved to /home/ga/Desktop/dashboard_layout.png.
